Full Shopify Build — Design, Setup & Code

A complete Shopify store, built from zero

I designed the theme, configured the entire backend, and wrote custom Liquid for product pages, an automated cart drawer, and a digital product delivery flow — start to finish, by myself.

Shopify Store — Design & Build

A cookware brand store built to sell

A bold, conversion-focused storefront for Hanzo, a Lithuanian kitchenware brand — homepage with a video hero and seasonal promos, clean product categories, and a polished mobile experience.

Shopify Store — Design & Build

A premium supplements brand, end to end

An elegant, conversion-focused storefront for Amiu, a Lithuanian supplements brand — a soft, premium look with a strong hero, a trust bar, and swipeable product sections that feel just as good on mobile.
